title: MedievalMedium
description: This project is created for fans of exciting adventures in a colorful fantasy world with elements of magic, mechanisms, and RPG. Everything is in a single style
body:
## Short description
This project is created for fans of exciting adventures in a colorful fantasy world with elements of magic, mechanisms, and RPG. Everything is in a single style.
## Leveling up a character
As you progress through the game, you'll discover new possibilities. At the beginning, you can only use wooden tools and a workbench, but as you progress, the possibilities expand!
## The Skill Tree
In the skill tree, you can unlock your class in all aspects and learn new abilities.
## Optimization
The project is well optimized.
## Adventures
The project is full of new buildings and a rich world with beautiful places: mysterious jungles, hot deserts, fragrant plains, dense forests, and sandy beaches.
## Other
You can cook a huge variety of dishes and automate many processes using mechanisms!
# Attention!
This is a beta version, and there is a lot that has not yet been done.
**In the future, you will have the opportunity to talk and start a family with new villagers, as well as quests that will reveal all aspects of the game, custom menu.**
